MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Sep-17-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Cahtherine Ann Robertson, Phal & Mccay, 408-286-5100, for Plaintiff, Flexible Funding Ltd. Liability Co..
Glenn Ward Calsda, Esq. Law Offices of Glenn Ward Calsada, 818-396-5504, for Defendant Que Moles Ltd.

Matter is heard consecutively with CGC-19-576659 Flexible Funding LTD v. GG, Inc. DBA Gallo Grill/ CGC-19-576659 Flexible Funding LTD v. GG, Inc., dba Gallo Grill as the same issues apply as to all 3 matters.

Counsel for plaintiff contests the Court's tentative ruling.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
